hero.title: Smart Core Breakthrough · Precision Minimally Invasive
hero.subtitle: Becoming the Core Force in Protecting Human Health
hero.description: Shanghai Shiyin Endoscope Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, production, and sales of medical endoscopes. We are committed to providing high-quality minimally invasive surgery solutions to healthcare institutions worldwide, making every surgery more precise and efficient.

camera4k.name: 4K Medical Endoscopic Camera System
camera4k.description: Adopting advanced 4K ultra-high definition technology to provide clear and delicate surgical vision, supporting multiple department applications.

ledlight.name: LED Medical Endoscope Cold Light Source
ledlight.description: High-brightness LED cold light source providing stable and uniform illumination with long service life.

co2.name: CO2 Insufflator
co2.description: Precisely controls abdominal pressure, providing a stable pneumoperitoneum environment to ensure surgical safety.

irrigation.name: Irrigation Pump
irrigation.description: Provides stable liquid irrigation pressure for surgery, ensuring clear surgical vision.

suction.name: Suction Irrigation Pump
suction.description: Achieves automatic liquid irrigation and suction during surgery, keeping the surgical field clean.

monitor.name: Medical Monitor
monitor.description: Professional-grade medical display restoring true colors, meeting high standards of operating rooms.

cart.name: Workstation Cart
cart.description: Mobile workbench specially designed for endoscope systems, clean and beautiful, easy to operate.

solutions.title: Department Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Meeting All Department Minimally Invasive Surgery Needs
solutions.description: We provide professional endoscope solutions for different departments, making minimally invasive surgery more precise and efficient

general.name: General Surgery
general.description: Applicable to laparoscopic surgeries such as cholecystectomy, appendectomy, and gastrointestinal surgery.

thoracic.name: Thoracic Surgery
thoracic.description: Applicable to thoracoscopic surgeries such as lobectomy, esophageal surgery, and thymectomy.

gynecology.name: Gynecology
gynecology.description: Applicable to myomectomy, ovarian cyst removal, ectopic pregnancy surgery, and more.

ent.name: ENT
ent.description: Applicable to sinus surgery, vocal cord polyp removal, ear endoscopy, and more.

orthopedics.name: Orthopedics
orthopedics.description: Applicable to arthroscopic surgery, minimally invasive spine surgery, and more.

urology.name: Urology
urology.description: Applicable to minimally invasive surgeries such as kidney stones, benign prostatic hyperplasia, and bladder tumors.

proctology.name: Proctology
proctology.description: Applicable to minimally invasive surgeries for hemorrhoids, anal fistula, rectal polyps, and more.

aesthetic.name: Aesthetic Medicine
aesthetic.description: Applicable to facial rejuvenation, injection aesthetics, laser treatment, and more.
